Anatta Nergui

← Collection

Wonder

Unimaginable depths
Still —
Pregnant

Incomprehensibly contained
In no space
Filled —

All time, origins
Visions
Condensed untouched

In dark, infinitesimal
Directionless —
Inside

Futilely squandered
In infinity —
Outside

Man’s wonder
Bounties —
God’s vanity

Atmosphere
oracularcompressed
Crux
inversion
Words
32
Domain
consciousnessinfinity
Ground
nondualapophatic
